title: Number of Smooth Descent Periods of a Stock
titleCn: 股票平滑下跌阶段的数目

testcases.input: prices = [3,2,1,4] Output: 7 Explanation: There are 7 smooth descent periods: [3], [2], [1], [4], [3,2], [2,1], and [3,2,1] Note that a period with one day is a smooth descent period by the definition.
testcases.expectedOutput: 7 Explanation: There are 7 smooth descent periods: [3], [2], [1], [4], [3,2], [2,1], and [3,2,1] Note that a period with one day is a smooth descent period by the definition.

testcases.input: prices = [8,6,7,7] Output: 4 Explanation: There are 4 smooth descent periods: [8], [6], [7], and [7] Note that [8,6] is not a smooth descent period as 8 - 6 ≠ 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: There are 4 smooth descent periods: [8], [6], [7], and [7] Note that [8,6] is not a smooth descent period as 8 - 6 ≠ 1.

testcases.input: prices = [1] Output: 1 Explanation: There is 1 smooth descent period: [1]
